texto: There was once a man who went on a journey to correct his regrets, He tried everything he could. At the end of his journey he realized that no matter how hard he tries, the door of miracles will never opened for him. That is why he thought, instead of regretting about the past what's more important now is to change the present for the future.
explicacao: Citação de Marlon Amparo sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “There was once a man who went on a journey to correct his regrets, He tried everything he could. …” articula reflexao, failure, sucess em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e viagem.
